nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.block_status, COUNT(*) AS script_count, b.block_reason AS reason_category
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_hold b ON b.script_id = a.id
WHERE  a.block_status  = 'MALPRACTICE'
GROUP  BY a.block_status, b.block_reason
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_hold.block_reason, script_hold.block_reason. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
